violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained needs cleaning. Bottom-inside Avantico freezer needs cleaning.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mops noted not all hung to air dry.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the women's toilet room.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Light cover in front entrance noted in need of cleaning. Sealed cement floor in establishment needs routine cleaning. Broken ceiling tiles noted in mens restroom need replaced.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Bottom-insides of two True reachin coolers noted in need of cleaning. Ice machine interior noted not properly maintained needs routine cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Cupboards and shelving in front service area noted not in good repair.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the women's toilet room.
